summary: Implemented the style theme mapper system. Added Theme type interfaces (ThemeTypography, ThemePalette, ThemeSpacing, ThemeBorders, ThemeSurfaces, Theme) to types.ts. Created 5 era-specific theme definitions (early-web, portal-era, web2, startup-minimal, alt-timeline) in src/domain/themes/. Added barrel export with themes array and themesByEraId record. Implemented selectTheme(seed, era) in theme-mapper.ts using deriveSeed for deterministic selection. All 186 tests pass including 34 US-009 tests, plus lint and typecheck.
